meaning: n.牡马(尤指种马),留种的雄兽
examples: The stallion pawed the ground impatiently.
Cord held the reins while the stallion tugged and snorted.
The stallion bucked as he fought against the reins holding him tightly in.
The horse, Donner, was a model for its 2002 animated flick Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron.
I'll Have Another was sired by Flower Alley, a stallion standing at Three Chimneys Farm.
